TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit SpeechTranscriptionModelFactory extends System.Object

Docs.summary: A factory class for creating instances of the models for mocking.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.ChannelCombinedPhrases ChannelCombinedPhrases (int? channel = default, string text = default);
.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.ChannelCombinedPhrases ChannelCombinedPhrases(valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> channel, string text) cil managed
Public Shared Function ChannelCombinedPhrases (Optional channel As Nullable(Of Integer) = Nothing, Optional text As String = Nothing) As ChannelCombinedPhrases
static member ChannelCombinedPhrases : Nullable<int> * string -> Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.ChannelCombinedPhrases

Docs.param: The 0-based channel index. Only present if channel separation is enabled.
The complete transcribed text for the channel.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.EnhancedModeProperties EnhancedModeProperties (bool? enabled = default, string task = default, string targetLanguage = default, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> prompt = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.EnhancedModeProperties EnhancedModeProperties(valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> enabled, string task, string targetLanguage, class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<string> prompt) cil managed

Public Shared Function EnhancedModeProperties (Optional enabled As Nullable(Of Boolean) = Nothing, Optional task As String = Nothing, Optional targetLanguage As String = Nothing, Optional prompt As IEnumerable(Of String) = Nothing) As EnhancedModeProperties
static member EnhancedModeProperties : Nullable<bool> * string * string * seq<string> -> Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.EnhancedModeProperties

Docs.param: Enable enhanced mode for transcription. This is automatically set to true when task, targetLanguage, or prompt are specified.
Task type for enhanced mode.
Target language for enhanced mode.
A list of user prompts.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.PhraseListProperties PhraseListProperties (System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> phrases = default, float? biasingWeight = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.PhraseListProperties PhraseListProperties(class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<string> phrases, valuetype System.Nullable`1<float32> biasingWeight) cil managed

static member PhraseListProperties : seq<string> * Nullable<single> -> Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.PhraseListProperties

Docs.param: List of phrases for recognition.
Biasing weight for phrase list (0.0-2.0).

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedPhrase TranscribedPhrase (int? channel = default, int? speaker = default, int offsetMilliseconds = 0, int durationMilliseconds = 0, string text = default, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedWord> words = default, string locale = default, float confidence = 0);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedPhrase TranscribedPhrase(valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> channel, valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> speaker, int32 offsetMilliseconds, int32 durationMilliseconds, string text, class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedWord> words, string locale, float32 confidence) cil managed

Public Shared Function TranscribedPhrase (Optional channel As Nullable(Of Integer) = Nothing, Optional speaker As Nullable(Of Integer) = Nothing, Optional offsetMilliseconds As Integer = 0, Optional durationMilliseconds As Integer = 0, Optional text As String = Nothing, Optional words As IEnumerable(Of TranscribedWord) = Nothing, Optional locale As String = Nothing, Optional confidence As Single = 0) As TranscribedPhrase

static member TranscribedPhrase : Nullable<int> * Nullable<int> * int * int * string * seq<Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedWord> * string * single -> Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedPhrase
MemberSignature.Usage: Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.SpeechTranscriptionModelFactory.TranscribedPhrase (channel, speaker, offsetMilliseconds, durationMilliseconds, text, words, locale, confidence)

Docs.param: The 0-based channel index. Only present if channel separation is enabled.
A unique integer number that is assigned to each speaker detected in the audio without particular order. Only present if speaker diarization is enabled.
The start offset of the phrase in milliseconds.
The duration of the phrase in milliseconds.
The transcribed text of the phrase.
The words that make up the phrase. Only present if word-level timestamps are enabled.
The locale of the phrase.
The confidence value for the phrase.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedWord TranscribedWord (string text = default, int offsetMilliseconds = 0, int durationMilliseconds = 0);
.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedWord TranscribedWord(string text, int32 offsetMilliseconds, int32 durationMilliseconds) cil managed
Public Shared Function TranscribedWord (Optional text As String = Nothing, Optional offsetMilliseconds As Integer = 0, Optional durationMilliseconds As Integer = 0) As TranscribedWord
static member TranscribedWord : string * int * int -> Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedWord

Docs.param: The recognized word, including punctuation.
The start offset of the word in milliseconds.
The duration of the word in milliseconds.
Docs.summary: Time-stamped word in the display form.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscriptionDiarizationOptions TranscriptionDiarizationOptions (bool? enabled = default, int? maxSpeakers = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscriptionDiarizationOptions TranscriptionDiarizationOptions(valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> enabled, valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> maxSpeakers) cil managed
Public Shared Function TranscriptionDiarizationOptions (Optional enabled As Nullable(Of Boolean) = Nothing, Optional maxSpeakers As Nullable(Of Integer) = Nothing) As TranscriptionDiarizationOptions
static member TranscriptionDiarizationOptions : Nullable<bool> * Nullable<int> -> Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscriptionDiarizationOptions

Docs.param: Enable speaker diarization. This is automatically set to true when maxSpeakers is specified.
Gets or sets a hint for the maximum number of speakers for diarization. Must be greater than 1 and less than 36.
Docs.summary: The Speaker Diarization settings. Diarization settings must be specified to enable speaker diarization.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscriptionOptions TranscriptionOptions (Uri audioUri = default, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> locales = default, System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string,Uri> models = default, Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.ProfanityFilterMode? profanityFilterMode = default, Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscriptionDiarizationOptions diarizationOptions = default, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<int> activeChannels = default, Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.EnhancedModeProperties enhancedMode = default, Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.PhraseListProperties phraseList = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscriptionOptions TranscriptionOptions(class System.Uri audioUri, class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<string> locales, class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, class System.Uri> models, valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.ProfanityFilterMode> profanityFilterMode, class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscriptionDiarizationOptions diarizationOptions, class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<int32> activeChannels, class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.EnhancedModeProperties enhancedMode, class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.PhraseListProperties phraseList) cil managed

Public Shared Function TranscriptionOptions (Optional audioUri As Uri = Nothing, Optional locales As IEnumerable(Of String) = Nothing, Optional models As IDictionary(Of String, Uri) = Nothing, Optional profanityFilterMode As Nullable(Of ProfanityFilterMode) = Nothing, Optional diarizationOptions As TranscriptionDiarizationOptions = Nothing, Optional activeChannels As IEnumerable(Of Integer) = Nothing, Optional enhancedMode As EnhancedModeProperties = Nothing, Optional phraseList As PhraseListProperties = Nothing) As TranscriptionOptions

static member TranscriptionOptions : Uri * seq<string> * System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, Uri> * Nullable<Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.ProfanityFilterMode> * Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscriptionDiarizationOptions * seq<int> * Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.EnhancedModeProperties * Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.PhraseListProperties -> Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscriptionOptions
MemberSignature.Usage: Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.SpeechTranscriptionModelFactory.TranscriptionOptions (audioUri, locales, models, profanityFilterMode, diarizationOptions, activeChannels, enhancedMode, phraseList)

Docs.param: The URL of the audio to be transcribed. The audio must be shorter than 2 hours in audio duration and smaller than 250 MB in size. If both Audio and AudioUrl are provided, Audio is used.
A list of possible locales for the transcription. If not specified, the locale of the speech in the audio is detected automatically from all supported locales.
Maps some or all candidate locales to a model URI to be used for transcription. If no mapping is given, the default model for the locale is used.
Mode of profanity filtering.
Mode of diarization.
The 0-based indices of the channels to be transcribed separately. If not specified, multiple channels are merged and transcribed jointly. Only up to two channels are supported.
Enhanced mode properties.
Phrase list properties.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscriptionResult TranscriptionResult (int durationMilliseconds = 0, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.ChannelCombinedPhrases> combinedPhrases = default, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedPhrase> phrases = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscriptionResult TranscriptionResult(int32 durationMilliseconds, class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.ChannelCombinedPhrases> combinedPhrases, class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedPhrase> phrases) cil managed

Public Shared Function TranscriptionResult (Optional durationMilliseconds As Integer = 0, Optional combinedPhrases As IEnumerable(Of ChannelCombinedPhrases) = Nothing, Optional phrases As IEnumerable(Of TranscribedPhrase) = Nothing) As TranscriptionResult

static member TranscriptionResult : int * seq<Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.ChannelCombinedPhrases> * seq<Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedPhrase> -> Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscriptionResult

Docs.param: The duration of the audio in milliseconds.
The full transcript for each channel.
The transcription results segmented into phrases.
Docs.summary: The result of the transcribe operation.
